$$
\begin{array}{r|ccccc}
 & \prob & \odds & \logodds & \vx & \vb \\
\hline
\prob
  & 1
  & \sqf{1+\odds}
  & \dfrac{\sqf{1+\odds}}{\odds}
  & \text{undef}
  & \text{undef} \\[10pt]
\odds
  & \sqf{1-\prob}
  & 1
  & \dfrac{1}{\odds}
  & \text{undef}
  & \text{undef} \\[10pt]
\logodds
  & \prob(1-\prob)
  & \odds
  & 1
  & \text{undef}
  & \text{undef} \\[10pt]
\vx
  & \ub{\vb \prob(1-\prob)}_{p \times 1}
  & \ub{\vb \odds}_{p \times 1}
  & \ub{\vb}_{p \times 1}
  & \ub{\idmat}_{p \times p}
  & \mathbf{0}_{p \times p} \\[10pt]
\vb
  & \ub{\vx \prob(1-\prob)}_{p \times 1}
  & \ub{\vx \odds}_{p \times 1}
  & \ub{\vx}_{p \times 1}
  & \mathbf{0}_{p \times p}
  & \ub{\idmat}_{p \times p} \\
\end{array}
$$
